steps.title: Track the long process
steps.content: The passage describes horse domestication as a process that began about 6,000 years ago and produced a present-day species after millennia. The transition should emphasize gradual development through selective breeding.

steps.title: Match the time scale
steps.content: Choice A promises another timeline illustration. Choice C compares the process to itself. Choice D reverses cause and effect by making domestication happen before selective breeding. The remaining choice captures the multi-generational nature of the process. The answer is B.
